headline: A Look At BAE Systems (LSE:BA.) Valuation After Recent Share Price Weakness And Backlog Growth
summary: Recent share performance and business scale BAE Systems (LSE:BA.) shares have seen mixed recent moves, with a 1 day return of about a 3% decline and a past week return around a 9% decline, alongside a past 3 months return near 22%. The group reports annual revenue of about £28.3b and net income of roughly £2.1b, with operations spread across segments such as Electronic Systems, Air, Maritime, Platforms & Services, and Cyber & Intelligence.
